## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce Marcel Santilli and explore potential AI workflow collaborations with Lightspeed's marketing team.](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company offers custom AI workflows for content creation, sales enablement, and marketing automation at $9,000/month per work stream](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Lightspeed is considering pivoting from AirOps to Marcel's more comprehensive managed service approach](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Content creation (100k words/mo) is the recommended starting point, with potential to expand into personalized outreach and other use cases](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Marcel's team includes dedicated managers, global talent, and industry-specific freelancers to execute AI-driven strategies](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=1915.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Background and Company Overview

  - [Founded content programs at IBM (securityintelligence.com) and HP (Tech Beacon)](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Built contributor networks and high-volume content pipelines (20 articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Transitioned to go-to-market systems/ops at HashiCorp, then AI focus at DeepGram](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Current company offers AI workflow development and managed services](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=1915.0)

### AI Workflow Examples and Capabilities

  - [Personalized outreach: Scrapes prospect data, analyzes psychology, generates tailored messages](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [Content creation: Identifies keyword opportunities, clusters topics, generates and publishes articles](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
  - [Sales enablement: Synthesizes Salesforce data, provides insights to product teams via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [Case study generation and various marketing automation tasks](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)

### Engagement Model and Pricing

  - [$9,000/month per work stream (e.g., content, AI enablement)](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=2522.0)
  - [Content work stream includes 100,000 words/month (\~$0.10/word)](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=2527.0)
  - [3-month initial commitment, cancelable anytime after](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=2723.0)
  - [Includes strategy, execution, custom AI workflows, and dedicated managing editor](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=2533.0)

### Team Structure and Expertise

  - [Global distributed team with perfect English speakers](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=2925.0)
  - [Mix of experienced professionals (e.g., former growth leads) and trained offshore talent](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=2880.0)
  - [Network of \~50 industry-specific freelance writers/editors](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=2955.0)

### Potential Lightspeed Use Cases

  - [Blog content creation and SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=2251.0)
  - [Performance marketing applications](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=3189.0)
  - [Sales enablement and account research](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=3223.0)
  - [Customer success call analysis and insights extraction](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=2392.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Rich to pause AirOps procurement process and re-evaluate options](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=3122.0)
  - [Jackie to explore performance marketing use cases with Rich's team](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=3137.0)
  - [Kady to follow up with Marcel to discuss potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=3197.0)
  - [Marcel to set up Slack channel for easier communication and link sharing](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=3092.0)
  - [Consider scheduling a deep-dive session on content and performance marketing use cases](https://fathom.video/share/qGHfqpVd9NdxkY4cx4sCUTbQFmXPJcPz?tab=summary&timestamp=3157.0)
